_comment: SAP BTP Cloud Connector configuration template for Belgium Delhaize ECC 6.0

system_mappings.description: SAP ECC 6.0 RFC — Belgium Delhaize production

resources.description: Allow all RFC function modules (restrict in production)

btp_destination.name: ECC-RFC-BE
btp_destination.description: SAP ECC 6.0 RFC connection for BAPI_PRICES_CONDITIONS

required_function_modules.name: BAPI_PRICES_CONDITIONS
required_function_modules.purpose: Create/update ZMKD condition records in A004
required_function_modules.note: Confirm with SAP BASIS that RFC user has S_RFC authorization for this FM

setup_checklist: Install SAP BTP Cloud Connector 2.x on Belgium Delhaize on-premise server
Pair Cloud Connector to BTP subaccount using subaccount_id above
Configure system mapping: ecc-be.internal -> SAP ECC app server
Create BTP Destination 'ECC-RFC-BE' with RFC credentials
Create RFC user in SAP ECC with S_RFC + V_KONH_VKS authorizations
Test RFC connectivity: BTP Connectivity Explorer -> ping ecc-be.internal:3300
Set BTP_ENABLED=true in Azure Container Apps environment variables
Set BTP_CLIENT_ID, BTP_CLIENT_SECRET in Key Vault / ACA secrets
Verify BAPI_PRICES_CONDITIONS call creates ZMKD record in A004 (SAP transaction VK13)
